meanings.definition: an occurrence that causes special pleasure or delight

examples: Do right by her
Treat him with caution, please
Handle the press reporters gently

meanings.definition: subject to a process or treatment, with the aim of readying for some purpose, improving, or remedying a condition
examples: process cheese
process hair
treat the water so it can be drunk
treat the lawn with chemicals
treat an oil spill
The doctor treated my broken leg
The nurses cared for the bomb victims
The patient must be treated right away or she will die
Treat the infection with antibiotics

meanings.definition: act on verbally or in some form of artistic expression
examples: This book deals with incest
The course covered all of Western Civilization
The new book treats the history of China

meanings.definition: provide with a gift or entertainment
examples: Grandmother always treated us to the circus
I like to treat myself to a day at a spa when I am depressed

meanings.definition: provide with choice or abundant food or drink
examples: Don't worry about the expensive wine--I'm treating
She treated her houseguests with good food every night

meanings.definition: engage in negotiations in order to reach an agreement
examples: they had to treat with the King

meanings.definition: regard or consider in a specific way
examples: I treated his advances as a joke
